title: Cleaning Brush Toilet Brush,Home Kitchen Bathroom Window Crevice Cleaning Brush,4 pcs Hard Bristle Magic Gap Cleaning Tool,Tile Groove Gap Scrubbing Brush-Grey white
features: 【High-quality materials】High-end boutique gap brushes, dense bristles, hard, made of high-quality plastic and stainless steel to ensure durability and long-lasting performance.

【Deep Cleaning Power】 With a 13.5cm ergonomic long handle and anti-slip wave-textured grip, this brush offers comfortable control for extended use. The 4mm-thick flat brush head and 20° angled design penetrate narrow gaps, tile grooves, and hard-to-reach small spaces (e.g., bathroom tile gaps, window tracks, and toilet crevices) for thorough scrubbing

【 Multi-Purpose Magic Brush】 A must-have cleaning tool for home, kitchen, and bathroom! Tackle grime in corners, faucets, tile grout, sinks, shower doors, stove crevices, fridge seals, furniture, car interiors, and more. Works as a scrubbing brush, gap cleaner, and deep cleaner for all surfaces

【Upgraded Design Highlights】 1.Sleek Modern Aesthetic: Features a timeless white-and-grey color scheme that blends seamlessly with any home décor. 2.Ergonomic Grip: Boasts an ergonomically contoured handle crafted from eco-friendly ABS plastic, enhanced with anti-slip wave grooves for secure, fatigue-free control—comfortable even during prolonged cleaning sessions. 3.Superior Bristle Technology: Engineered to be 50% denser than standard gap brushes, these hard bristles deliver aggressive scrubbing power while resisting wear.

【4-Pack Set for Smart Use】 Includes one brush for kitchen (grease/oil) and one for bathroom/toilet. Pair with household cleaners to eliminate bacteria buildup in sinks, window seams, and tile gaps. Achieve 360° hygiene by removing debris from hidden areas
